# callWebScriptMethod(_:withArguments:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the result of executing a method in the scripting environment.

## Declaration

```swift
func callWebScriptMethod(_ name: String!, withArguments arguments: [Any]!) -> Any!
```

## Parameters

- **name**: The name of the method to invoke.
- **arguments**: The values to pass to the method.

## Return Value

The return value of the method. Returns [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebUndefined] if an exception is thrown in the JavaScript environment or the method has no return value.

## Executing scripts

- **evaluateWebScript(_:)**: Returns the result of evaluating a script in the scripting environment.
